summary: Tested OC (Option Chain) button bug fix in MultiChartLayout. Verified prop propagation: TradingDashboard → MultiChartLayout → ChartSlot → ChartPanel. All 5 required scenarios tested and passed.
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: In MultiChartLayout, ChartSlot hardcodes isCrypto={false}, meaning OC button will appear even if user searches for BTC/crypto stocks in the chart slot. The OC visibility check for crypto depends on isCrypto prop, not selectedStock.type. This is a design choice (MultiChartLayout is equity-focused) but could confuse users who load crypto in chart slots and see OC button.
INFO: The 'Select stock…' placeholder uses Unicode ellipsis (…) not ASCII (...). This can cause issues in testing and URL encoding — cosmetic but worth noting.
context_for_next_testing_agent: OC button bug fix fully verified. MultiChartLayout now correctly passes onOpenOptionChain prop through the chain. Single chart (1), dual chart (2), and both chart slots tested. The OC button (data-testid=option-chain-btn) appears after equity stock is loaded and clicking it opens OptionChainModal (data-testid=option-chain-modal) with CALL|STRIKE|PUT columns.

feature_test_results.oc_button_click_opens_modal: PASS - Modal shows RELIANCE INDUSTRIES with CALL/STRIKE/PUT columns
feature_test_results.modal_has_strike_prices_and_call_put: PASS - Data loaded from NSE Live API
feature_test_results.oc_absent_for_option_type: PASS (code confirmed: selectedStock.type !== 'OPTION' condition in ChartPanel line 1953)
feature_test_results.multi_chart_2_layout_slot1_oc: PASS - OC button visible and modal opens for RELIANCE
feature_test_results.multi_chart_2_layout_slot2_oc: PASS - OC button visible and INFY modal opens from slot 2
feature_test_results.prop_propagation_fix_verified: PASS - MultiChartLayout line 288 accepts onOpenOptionChain, passes to ChartSlot at line 424, ChartSlot passes to ChartPanel at line 245

rca_of_bug: The OC button was not working because MultiChartLayout was not accepting the onOpenOptionChain prop. ChartSlot was hardcoding () => {} as the stub for onOpenOptionChain when calling ChartPanel. Fix: (1) MultiChartLayout now accepts onOpenOptionChain in its props destructuring, (2) passes it to each ChartSlot, (3) ChartSlot passes it to ChartPanel instead of empty stub. TradingDashboard already had the correct handler: onOpenOptionChain={(payload) => setShowOptionChain(payload)}.
